_note: The featured 'pairing' module for Cars — category equivalent of Style's 'This Week's Fit.' Here it's 'The Trunk Kit': the gear every guy should carry. Items reference gear picks by slug. Writeups final, GuyTalk voice.

sets.title: The Trunk Kit
sets.subtitle: The four things that make you the guy who's never stranded.
sets.writeup: You don't need to be a car person to carry yourself like one. You need a trunk that means a dead battery, a fender-bender, or a filthy car never ruins your day. A NOCO jump pack means you start your own car — and rescue the next guy. A dash cam quietly settles any dispute about whose fault it was. And a basic wash kit keeps whatever you drive looking like you respect it. Under three hundred dollars total, and it's the difference between owning a car and actually handling one.

items.role: Never stranded by a dead battery

sets.flashyCheck: Nothing here shows off. It's all quiet competence — the prepared guy beats the flashy one every time.
